{{Quote|It'd be easier to talk a siringana into a box.|Common saying|<ref name="TEGtPaM" />}}
The '''siringana''' were vicious, [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] predators native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[N'zoth]].<ref name="TEGtPaM" /> These beasts had four three-taloned legs, a pair of scythelike arms, a straight, spiked tail, a mouth full of razor-sharp [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]] and a face similar to that of a [[Yevetha]].  Their tough, leathery brown skin allowed them to blend into the desert environment.<ref name=":0">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>  They would turn on other siringana easily so there were never more than three in a group at a time, and they seemed to relish instilling fear in their prey before moving in on the kill.<ref name=":0" />  They reproduced by laying eggs, which were considered a delicacy in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]].<ref name=":0" /> The siringana were considered to be as merciless and brutal as the Yevetha, who were the only [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] native to [[N'zoth]]. These bigoted, violent natives revered the siringana and its ability to kill its enemies, and some high-caste Yevetha kept sirigana pits where they would sacrifice victims.<ref name=":0" />
